title: 🔥宏观风险压制反弹空间
body: 市场受宏观流动性压制，处于弱势筑底阶段。BMRI指标读数为73，深陷RISK_OFF区间，表明资金风险偏好极低。尽管BTC周内反弹5.8%，但若无外部流动性注入，涨势难以为继。当前走势高度依赖油价表现，只有降息预期重燃，才能打开上行空间。短期维持中性。美联储会转向吗？
body_en: The market is weighed down by macro liquidity, stuck in a weak bottoming process. BMRI reads 73, deep in the RISK_OFF zone, signaling rock-bottom risk appetite. Despite BTC's 5.8% weekly bounce, this rally is unsustainable without an external liquidity injection. Price action is currently tied to oil; we won't see meaningful upside until rate cut expectations reignite. Neutral stance in the short term. Will the Fed pivot?
